mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-0 — Read-Only Live Baseline and Reuse Audit

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
payload=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1A0_R2\V1A0_R2_STATIC_AUDIT.py")
installed=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008_V1A0_R2_STATIC_AUDIT.py")
repo=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1A0_R2\REPOSITORY_REFERENCE.json")
assert installed.is_file(), f"missing installed audit payload: {installed}"
actual=hashlib.sha256(installed.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
expected="efe6da3660a8cff536d31e6afcf33899702cd9d13425e9edbfac2dc80e532943"
assert actual==expected, f"payload hash mismatch: {actual}"
source=installed.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(source,str(installed),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(source)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split('.')[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden_imports={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg"}
bad=sorted(imports & forbidden_imports)
assert not bad, "forbidden imports: "+", ".join(bad)
for marker in ("subprocess.run(","subprocess.Popen(","os.system(","shell=True","requests.","urlopen(","pip install","Path.unlink(","shutil.rmtree("):
    assert marker not in source, "forbidden operation marker: "+marker
assert repo.is_file(), f"missing repository reference: {repo}"
assert hashlib.sha256(repo.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="f198e70104f099f801159514a51f806c9a313ec12da4d4ae19423aa001431395"
repo_data=json.loads(repo.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert repo_data.get("network_required_on_foxai") is False
assert repo_data.get("prepared_for_mission")=="ENG-20260721-042128-CF3008"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A0_R2_STATIC_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact R2 payload, syntax, static safety boundary, and repository reference
Run bounded Agent Fox V1A-0 R2 static baseline audit
